name: Minimum Add to Make Parentheses Valid
description: A parentheses string is valid if every opening parenthesis '(' has a corresponding closing parenthesis ')' and vice versa. Given a parentheses string s, return the minimum number of parentheses we must add to make the string valid.
constraints: 1 <= s.length <= 1000. s consists of '(' and ')' characters only.

performance.stress_intent: exercise unmatched-open and unmatched-close accounting over multiple max-length parenthesis strings that reject repeated pair-stripping locally
